svg.title: PolyUMI working Zarr schema (final)
svg.desc: Scene-level Zarr v2 directory store with per-episode subgroups, multiple pose source support, sidecar files for raw mp4 and SLAM atlas, and downstream export paths

g.text: stream codec metadata · raw .mp4 sidecar paths
float64 per stream · own native rate · no resampling
→ shared time via np.searchsorted at read
copy DirectoryStore → ZipStore (.zarr.zip) when pipeline complete
load compressed chunks → MemoryStore for fast training I/O
benchmark JpegXl ratios on real GoPro footage before committing
